resume_excerpt: SWAGATIKA NAYAK ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst Austin, TX • ( 616) 264- 4094 • swagatika.n.nayak@gmail.com • www.linkedin.com/in/swagatika-n-nayak Authorized to work in the U.S. • No sponsorship required PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support . Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines . Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness. TECHNICAL SKILLS Languages & Querying Advanced SQL (joins, CTEs, window functions, performance tuning), Python (Pandas, PySpark – upskilling), Shell scripting ETL & Data Integration Informatica PowerCenter, Azure Data Factory, SSIS, source-to-target mapping, ETL validation, data reconciliation Cloud & Modern Stack Snowflake, Databricks, Azure (ADF, Blob, Synapse), AWS fundamentals, dbt ( basic familiarity ) Data Warehousing Star / Snowflake schemas, dimensional modeling, fact & dimension design, Slowly Changing Dimensions (SCD), data lineage Data Quality & Governance Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage Healthcare Data Medical claims, member eligibility, provider data, payer operations, HIPAA awareness, EDI familiarity BI & Reporting Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query) Tools & Methodology JIRA, Confluence, Git, Agile / Scrum, regression & release validation, production data support AI / Modern Data GenAI-assisted data analysis, prompt engineering for data, AI-ready data pipeline concepts PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE Elevance Health — Austin , TX (Remote) Sep 2022 – Present ETL Analyst / Healthcare Data Analyst Validated 60+ ETL workflows across Informatica and Azure Data Factory feeding enterprise healthcare reporting and analytics platforms—covering claims, member eligibility, provider, and payer-operations data supporting multi-million-member BCBS populations. Authored 200+ advanced SQL queries (multi-table joins, window functions, CTEs) for source-to-target reconciliation across 100M+ claim and member records, reducing release-blocking defects by ~30% across major releases. Built a library of 300+ reusable validation test cases from mapping documents and business rules—covering record counts, duplicates, nulls, referential integrity, and business-rule logic—adopted across the QA team to standardize testing and reduce ramp time for new analysts. Investigated and resolved 70+ production data incidents through end-to-end root-cause analysis with engineering and business partners, protecting SLA-bound pipelines and member-facing data accuracy. Partnered with cross-functional teams of 12+ (Business Analysts, QA, Data Engineers, downstream report owners) across 2-week Agile sprints; managed 150+ JIRA defects through triage, clarification, validation, and closure. Contributed to data quality and reporting accuracy initiatives that reduced post-release data hotfixes by ~25% and improved stakeholder trust in payer-operations dashboards and downstream KPIs. Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building cloud and AI-ready data pipeline competencies to extend enterprise ETL expertise into modern data stacks. Initech Global ( Client: Amway Corporation) — Grand Rapids, MI Dec 2021 – Aug 2022 ETL Analyst Validated end-to-end data movement across 20+ source-to-target ETL flows for retail / direct-se
